title: Feeder Consolidation on a Distribution Substation
strategies: next-fit dispatch baseline: keep loading the current transformer until a block exceeds the thermal cap OR the breaker panel is full, then energize a new one and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
first-fit in arrival order: energize each block onto the lowest-index transformer that still has both thermal room and a free breaker channel, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering the queue

decreasing-order packing under the dual cap: steer the largest blocks first via first-fit-decreasing / best-fit-decreasing (respecting the K-channel limit), keeping the fewer-transformer dispatch so small blocks top off partly loaded transformers

seeded local search / metaheuristics: start from a decreasing-order dispatch and relocate/swap blocks between transformers (respecting both C and K) or run perturb-and-reoptimize restarts to retire near-empty transformers
